title: Had for Past Possession
explanation:
जब हम यह बताना चाहते हैं कि किसी के पास पहले कोई चीज़ थी (लेकिन अब नहीं है), तो हम 'Had' का उपयोग करते हैं। Had, 'Have' और 'Has' का Past Form है।

When we want to say that someone possessed something in the past (but not now), we use 'Had'. Had is the past form of both 'Have' and 'Has'.

examples.english: They had a lot of money.

examples.hindi: राम के पास एक बड़ा घर था।

rules: Had is used for ALL subjects — I, you, he, she, it, we, they
Had never changes its form (no 'hads' or 'hadded')
Had expresses past possession — the person had something before but may not have it now
Had can be used with singular or plural objects
keyPoints: सभी Subjects के साथ Had एक जैसा रहता है
Had का मतलब है — पहले था/थी/थे (लेकिन अब नहीं भी हो सकता)
